creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
Created attachment 169504
Patch for git-lfs 1.2.0 at devel/git-lfs (Makefile/distinfo)

This is an update for the bug #208152 (which still hasn't been fixed).
Fixed Makefile for building go-git-lfs-1.2.0, according to the contents in https://github.com/github/git-lfs/wiki/Installation
